name: Cocoa Pudding Cake (Lf)
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: The T-Factor Diet Book by Martin Katahn
Sift together the flour, sugar, cocoa powder, baking powder, and salt. Add the milk, oil, and vanilla, mixing by hand until smooth. Pour into an 8x8x2-inch baking pan that has been sprayed with nonstick spray. Combine the brown sugar, cocoa powder, and hot water and pour over the batter. Bake at 350°F for 45 minutes. Makes 8 servings.
